---
title: "Me"
comments: false
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/Residualsun1
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/residualsun1
---

## Basic information

This is Guozheng Huang's(you can also call me Residualsun) blog.

I buildt my first blog with `blogdown` on May 28th, 2023. It was changed twice times by myself and completed on June 6th.

During the theme within my first blog doesn't support multilanguages, I decide to bulid my English blog with Quarto and preserve [my Chinese blog](https://guozheng.rbind.io) in blogdown.

## Eaducation

Guangzhou University | 2021 - 2025

## Career

Sociology
